CreateLogShipper.destConfig.BOSPath: BOS path consisting of bucket and user-defined path, max 256 characters
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.partitionFormatTS: Partition format, e.g. %Y/%m/%d/%H/%M/, supports up to minute level, customizable, can be empty, default: %Y/%m/%d/%H/%M/
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.partitionFormatLogStream: Whether to use logstream as partition level, default: false
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.maxObjectSize: Maximum object size in MB, range 1 - 5*1024*1024 (5TB), default: 64
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.compressType: Compression type, options: snappy/gzip/bzip2/lzop or none, default: none
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.deliverInterval: Delivery interval in minutes, range 5-60, default: 5
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.storageFormat: Storage format, options: parquet, json, csv, default: json
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.csvHeadline: Whether to include field names in CSV output, default: false
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.csvDelimiter: CSV delimiter, options: comma (,), space ( ), pipe (|)
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.csvQuote: CSV quote character, options: single quote ('), double quote ("), none, customizable, default: none
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.nullIdentifier: Placeholder for null values in CSV, default: empty
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.selectedColumnName: Required for CSV and Parquet, selected column names as comma-separated list
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.selectedColumnType: Required for Parquet, selected column types as comma-separated list
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.fieldsName: Field names for KV shipper type, same size as fieldsType
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.fieldsType: Field types for KV shipper type, same size as fieldsName
CreateLogShipper.destConfig.shipperType: Shipper type, default: text; if system fields are included output is JSON; kv type ships only specified key-value pairs in JSON format
